interfaces.name: ConversationRole
interfaces.signature: enum ConversationRole: String, Codable { case user, counterpart }
interfaces.notes: Who speaks a given PromptCard turn.

interfaces.name: Scenario
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Scenario { var id: UUID; var title: String; var conversationKind: String; var counterpartName: String; var context: String; var scheduledFor: Date?; var createdAt: Date; var cards: [PromptCard]; var sessions: [RehearsalSession] }
interfaces.notes: Root entity for a defined upcoming conversation. conversationKind is a free string tag (e.g. 'salary_negotiation') not a closed enum, so users/rule engine can extend it.

interfaces.name: PromptCard
interfaces.signature: @Model final class PromptCard { var id: UUID; var scenarioID: UUID; var order: Int; var role: ConversationRole; var promptText: String; var expectedResponseHint: String? }
interfaces.notes: One likely turn in the conversation, ordered within a Scenario.

interfaces.name: RehearsalSession
interfaces.signature: @Model final class RehearsalSession { var id: UUID; var scenarioID: UUID; var startedAt: Date; var endedAt: Date?; var turnRecords: [RehearsalTurnRecord]; var reflectionNotes: [ReflectionNote] }
interfaces.notes: One full run-through of a Scenario's cards.

interfaces.name: RehearsalTurnRecord
interfaces.signature: @Model final class RehearsalTurnRecord { var id: UUID; var sessionID: UUID; var cardID: UUID; var transcript: String; var audioFilename: String?; var durationSeconds: Double; var critique: CritiqueResult? }
interfaces.notes: audioFilename references a file in Application Support, never stored as blob data.

interfaces.name: ReflectionNote
interfaces.signature: @Model final class ReflectionNote { var id: UUID; var sessionID: UUID; var text: String; var createdAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Free-text weak-spot / next-best-phrasing note attached to a session.

interfaces.name: CritiqueResult
interfaces.signature: struct CritiqueResult: Codable { var strengths: [String]; var weakSpots: [String]; var suggestedPhrasing: [String]; var source: CritiqueSource; var generatedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Embedded/codable value, not its own @Model, since it's owned 1:1 by a RehearsalTurnRecord.

interfaces.name: CritiqueSource
interfaces.signature: enum CritiqueSource: String, Codable { case ruleBased, onDeviceModel }
interfaces.notes: UI must always show which engine produced a critique so users trust the rule-based default and aren't confused by quality variance.

interfaces.name: CritiqueProviding
interfaces.signature: protocol CritiqueProviding: Sendable { func critique(response: String, forCard card: PromptCard) async -> CritiqueResult }
interfaces.notes: RuleBasedCritiqueProvider always available; OnDeviceLLMCritiqueProvider checked via isAvailable before use, never assumed.

interfaces.name: RuleBasedCritiqueProvider
interfaces.signature: struct RuleBasedCritiqueProvider: CritiqueProviding { func critique(response: String, forCard card: PromptCard) async -> CritiqueResult }
interfaces.notes: Ships to 100% of devices; detects filler words, hedging language, response length vs. expectedResponseHint.

interfaces.name: OnDeviceLLMCritiqueProvider
interfaces.signature: struct OnDeviceLLMCritiqueProvider: CritiqueProviding { static var isAvailable: Bool { get }; func critique(response: String, forCard card: PromptCard) async -> CritiqueResult }
interfaces.notes: isAvailable gates on device/OS Foundation Models eligibility; never the sole critique path, purely additive enhancement.

interfaces.name: SpeechRecognitionService
interfaces.signature: protocol SpeechRecognitionService: Sendable { func startTranscribing() async throws -> AsyncStream<String>; func stop() }
interfaces.notes: Wraps SFSpeechRecognizer; must handle authorization denial as a first-class state, not a crash.

interfaces.name: AudioRecordingService
interfaces.signature: protocol AudioRecordingService: Sendable { func startRecording() throws -> URL; func stopRecording() -> URL; var currentDuration: Double { get } }
interfaces.notes: Wraps AVAudioRecorder, writes .m4a to Application Support, returns filename for RehearsalTurnRecord.audioFilename.

interfaces.name: ScenarioStore
interfaces.signature: protocol ScenarioStore: Sendable { func save(_ scenario: Scenario) throws; func fetchAll() throws -> [Scenario]; func delete(_ scenario: Scenario) throws }
interfaces.notes: Thin wrapper over ModelContext so view models never touch SwiftData directly, keeping them testable with a fake store.

interfaces.name: EntitlementStore
interfaces.signature: protocol EntitlementStore: Sendable { var isPremium: Bool { get }; func refresh() async }
interfaces.notes: Backed by StoreKit 2 Transaction.currentEntitlements; free tier caps active Scenarios and RehearsalSessions per month.

interfaces.name: RehearsalPhase
interfaces.signature: enum RehearsalPhase: Equatable { case presentingCard(PromptCard); case recording(PromptCard); case reviewingResponse(PromptCard, transcript: String); case critiquing(PromptCard); case complete }
interfaces.notes: Single source of truth driving RehearsalSessionViewModel navigation; no boolean-flag navigation.

interfaces.name: RehearsalSessionViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class RehearsalSessionViewModel { var phase: RehearsalPhase; func advance() async; func retakeCurrentTurn() }
interfaces.notes: Owns the state machine for one live rehearsal run; consumes SpeechRecognitionService, AudioRecordingService, CritiqueProviding.

interfaces.name: ScenarioSetupViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class ScenarioSetupViewModel { var draft: Scenario; func addCard(role: ConversationRole, text: String); func save() throws }
interfaces.notes: Backs the manual scenario/card setup flow.

interfaces.name: ReviewViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class ReviewViewModel { var sessions: [RehearsalSession]; func addReflectionNote(_ text: String, to session: RehearsalSession) throws }
interfaces.notes: Backs session history / weak-spot review screen.

interfaces.name: StartRehearsalIntent
interfaces.signature: struct StartRehearsalIntent: AppIntent { static var title: LocalizedStringResource; func perform() async throws -> some IntentResult }
interfaces.notes: App Intent for Siri/Shortcuts quick rehearsal start on a given Scenario.

interfaces.name: UpcomingSessionWidget
interfaces.signature: struct UpcomingSessionWidget: Widget { var body: some WidgetConfiguration }
interfaces.notes: WidgetKit surface showing next scheduled Scenario; reads via App Group shared container, not direct SwiftData access.

interfaces.name: NotificationScheduler
interfaces.signature: protocol NotificationScheduler: Sendable { func scheduleReminder(for scenario: Scenario) throws; func cancelReminder(for scenario: Scenario) }
interfaces.notes: Wraps UNUserNotificationCenter for pre-conversation rehearsal reminders.
